Text.CultureInvariantString: The sun shines upon a new day

SleepMessages.SourceString: Darkness is banished by the dawn.
SleepMessages.LocalizedString: Darkness is banished by the dawn.

SleepMessages.SourceString: Sorry, it’s morning. You have to get up!
SleepMessages.LocalizedString: Sorry, it’s morning. You have to get up!

SleepMessages.SourceString: Birdsong wakes you from your slumber.
SleepMessages.LocalizedString: Birdsong wakes you from your slumber.

SleepMessages.SourceString: A new day means new possibilities.
SleepMessages.LocalizedString: A new day means new possibilities.

SleepMessages.SourceString: Turns out you’re not dead. So, get to work!
SleepMessages.LocalizedString: Turns out you’re not dead. So, get to work!

SleepMessages.SourceString: Get up! Those dragons aren’t going to slay themselves!
SleepMessages.LocalizedString: Get up! Those dragons aren’t going to slay themselves!

SleepMessages.SourceString: The gods gift you another sunrise.
SleepMessages.LocalizedString: The gods gift you another sunrise.
